privileged_info_summary: No privileged information metadata was embedded in task.json. The task.json file does not contain a metadata field. The task operates on synthetic EPCRA Tier II test data for 2019, containing a fictional facility named Green Valley Water Facility located at 123 First Avenue, Colchester, VT, with test chemical inventory data (Chlorine CAS 7782-50-5, Fluorosilic Acid CAS 16961-83-4) and placeholder contact information (test phone number 802-111-1111).
